trigger_condition: canvas.getContext('2d') returns null in offscreen/test environments
guard_snippet: const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d', opts); if (!ctx) throw new Error('Canvas 2D context unavailable');
potential_consequence: TypeError on ctx.drawImage at 10+ call sites

trigger_condition: cropRegion w or h is 0 → sw/sh = 0
guard_snippet: const sw = Math.max(1, Math.floor((cropRegion.w / 100) * vw));
potential_consequence: Zero-size canvas; getImageData throws InvalidStateError

trigger_condition: matchText called before ensureOcrData completes; _matcher is null
guard_snippet: if (!_matcher) throw new Error('OCR data not initialized — call ensureOcrData first');
potential_consequence: TypeError: Cannot read property findMatch of null

trigger_condition: video.duration is NaN, Infinity, or 0 after loadedmetadata
guard_snippet: if (!isFinite(duration) || duration <= 0) throw new Error('Invalid video duration');
potential_consequence: Infinite loop or NaN propagation through frame calculations

trigger_condition: frameIntervalSec is 0 when autoDetect fails silently
guard_snippet: const frameIntervalSec = Math.max(0.001, frameIntervalMs / 1000);
potential_consequence: framesToProcess = Infinity → infinite allocation and OOM

trigger_condition: One worker in Promise.all fails; already-created workers leak
guard_snippet: Use Promise.allSettled, terminate fulfilled workers on any rejection
potential_consequence: Orphaned Tesseract workers consuming memory indefinitely

trigger_condition: One worker.terminate() throws; Promise.all rejects, rest not terminated
guard_snippet: await Promise.allSettled(workers.map(w => w.terminate()));
potential_consequence: Remaining workers leak on partial termination failure

trigger_condition: FPS detection: medianInterval near 0 → fps rounds to Infinity
guard_snippet: const fps = Math.min(240, Math.max(1, Math.round(1 / medianInterval)));
potential_consequence: frameIntervalMs = 0 → downstream division by zero

trigger_condition: matchHabitatFrame calls _matcher.findMatch but _matcher may be null
guard_snippet: if (!_matcher) return null;
potential_consequence: TypeError crash during habitat scanning

trigger_condition: previewCanvas.getContext('2d') returns null
guard_snippet: const previewCtx = previewCanvas.getContext('2d'); if (!previewCtx) { /* skip preview */ }
potential_consequence: TypeError on drawImage crashes entire scan loop

trigger_condition: normalizeProfile receives empty profile (n=0)
guard_snippet: if (n === 0) return new Float64Array(0);
potential_consequence: mean /= 0 → NaN; all downstream correlations become NaN

trigger_condition: yEnd exceeds imageData height → OOB pixel read
guard_snippet: const safeYEnd = Math.min(yEnd, imageData.height);
potential_consequence: Reading undefined bytes from data array; silent garbage values

trigger_condition: stripX is negative → pixel index underflows
guard_snippet: const safeStripX = Math.max(0, stripX);
potential_consequence: Negative array index reads undefined → NaN in profile

trigger_condition: tx+tw or ty+th exceeds imageData dimensions
guard_snippet: const safeTw = Math.min(tw, width - tx); const safeTh = Math.min(th, Math.floor(data.length / 4 / width) - ty);
potential_consequence: OOB pixel access reads undefined → wrong fingerprint or crash

trigger_condition: frameIntervalMs=0 in settings → frameIntervalSec=0 → infinite loop
guard_snippet: const frameIntervalSec = Math.max(0.001, frameIntervalMs / 1000);
potential_consequence: for-loop never terminates; browser tab hangs

trigger_condition: Dataset entry has missing/malformed number field → parseInt returns NaN
guard_snippet: const na = parseInt(a.number?.replace('#', ''), 10) || 0;
potential_consequence: NaN comparison → unstable sort order; position mapping breaks

trigger_condition: videoWidth or videoHeight is 0 → all scaled params become 0
guard_snippet: if (!videoWidth || !videoHeight) throw new Error('Invalid video dimensions');
potential_consequence: Zero-size grid params → no tiles detected; silent empty results

trigger_condition: canvas.getContext('2d') returns null
guard_snippet: const frameCtx = frameCanvas.getContext('2d', opts); if (!frameCtx) throw new Error('Canvas context unavailable');
potential_consequence: TypeError on drawImage crashes scan pipeline

trigger_condition: seekVideo: 'seeked' event never fires and timeout resolves → frame not at expected time
guard_snippet: Log warning when timeout fires; consider rejecting or flagging stale frame
potential_consequence: Silent wrong-frame processing; incorrect tile classification

trigger_condition: getGridDataList called before ensureGridData; lists are empty arrays
guard_snippet: export async function getGridDataList(scanMode) { await ensureGridData(); ... }
potential_consequence: Returns empty array; UI shows 0 total items

trigger_condition: fpNames is empty (fingerprint data missing) → bestIdx stays -1
guard_snippet: if (fpNames.length === 0) return null;
potential_consequence: Always returns null; no items ever matched

trigger_condition: ocrLookup key is empty string → lower[0] is undefined
guard_snippet: if (lower.length === 0) continue;
potential_consequence: prefixIndex[undefined] created; pollutes index with bad entries

trigger_condition: ocrLookup key is single char → substring(0,2) returns 1 char
guard_snippet: const prefix = lower.length >= 2 ? lower.substring(0, 2) : lower;
potential_consequence: Duplicate index entries; minor memory waste and search overhead

trigger_condition: ocrLookup is null/undefined → Object.keys throws
guard_snippet: if (!ocrLookup || typeof ocrLookup !== 'object') return { findMatch: () => null, exactMatch: () => null, fuzzyMatch: () => null };
potential_consequence: TypeError crashes matcher initialization

trigger_condition: Corrupted localStorage: JSON.parse returns non-array (e.g. object)
guard_snippet: const sessions = JSON.parse(raw); if (!Array.isArray(sessions)) return [];
potential_consequence: sessions.sort is not a function → TypeError crash

trigger_condition: crypto.randomUUID unavailable in insecure context (HTTP)
guard_snippet: const id = sessionId || (crypto.randomUUID?.() ?? `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2)}`);
potential_consequence: TypeError: crypto.randomUUID is not a function

trigger_condition: Corrupted session payload: JSON.parse returns unexpected shape
guard_snippet: const parsed = JSON.parse(raw); if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== 'object') return null;
potential_consequence: Caller destructures missing properties → undefined propagation

trigger_condition: results contains circular references → JSON.stringify throws
guard_snippet: Wrap JSON.stringify in try/catch; return null on serialization failure
potential_consequence: Unhandled TypeError; saveSession returns undefined instead of null

trigger_condition: canvas.getContext('2d') returns null
guard_snippet: const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d'); if (!ctx) throw new Error('Canvas context unavailable');
potential_consequence: TypeError on drawImage; frame extraction fails silently

trigger_condition: Negative x or y passed to regionAvgRGB → OOB pixel index
guard_snippet: const x1 = Math.max(0, x); const y1 = Math.max(0, y);
potential_consequence: Reads garbage pixel data; misclassifies video type
